data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md, quick reference tables, skill lists, and any other existing documentation to reflect the new /dso:onboarding and /dso:architect-foundation skills
**Why**: CLAUDE.md is the primary reference for agent behavior — stale skill names will cause agents to invoke non-existent skills
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table, Quick Start section, skill lists, architecture section; any other existing docs referencing the three old skill names
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; script/config updates (S9)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Quick Reference, Quick Start, and all skill-referencing sections use /dso:onboarding and /dso:architect-foundation instead of the old names
  ← Satisfies: "A single /dso:onboarding skill replaces /dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, and /dso:design-onboarding"
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation references the old skill names except in redirect/migration context

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
